important_rule: This file is supplemental research knowledge only. Morning, overnight, and short-term recommendation skills must still scan the full tradable A-share market, read same-day news increment, read the latest valid market snapshot, and merge this hard-logic pool with full-market market-confirmed opportunities.

classification_rule.current_hard_logic: Current business/order/revenue/price evidence exists. Can be treated as hard-logic candidate after market confirmation.
classification_rule.future_expectation: Sample, certification, capacity buildout, customer validation, price-rise, or order expectation exists but is not yet earnings-confirmed. Can be traded in short-term mode when market confirmation and next-buyer logic are strong, but must be labeled as expectation trade.
classification_rule.pure_concept: Only label similarity, or the company clearly denies product/business/order. Can only be used as emotion/front-row/market signal, not hard-logic recommendation.
classification_rule.downgrade_note: Hard-logic downgrade does not mean the stock cannot rise. It means order/earnings evidence is not yet enough. Trading skills may restore trading score through auction, late-session acceptance, same-chain confirmation, and expectation spread, but cannot restore hard-logic score without new evidence.

fresh_evidence: VULTR selected HPE and NVIDIA for next-generation AI cloud-scale data center infrastructure.
NVIDIA announced AI infrastructure expansion plans.
NDRC price monitoring center researched computing-center electricity supply and pricing.
ByteDance increased domestic chip procurement; domestic AI infrastructure news remained active.
serenity_chokepoint_nodes: AI server power and thermal/power electronics

fresh_evidence: US semiconductor equipment/materials stocks strengthened; Applied Materials, ASML, and Lam Research hit records.
Memory/storage concept strengthened overseas and locally.
DRAM/data-center memory bottleneck stories continued during the week.

theme_map.theme: PCB, CCL, glass substrate, electronic cloth
fresh_evidence: PCB and CPO concepts led intraday.
TSMC glass-substrate progress and high-end CCL/electronic-cloth stories were widely discussed.
Multiple companies issued clarification or risk notices after sharp moves.
serenity_chokepoint_nodes: CCL/electronic resin/copper foil with real orders
glass-substrate validation is future optionality, not current confirmed earnings
theme_map.warning: This theme contains many pseudo-chokepoint names. Business verification and order evidence are mandatory.

fresh_evidence: Shenhao Technology disclosed an 11.67bn yuan computing-center intelligent O&M robot order.
Beijing and Jinan policy/news flow supported embodied intelligence and robotics applications.
serenity_chokepoint_nodes: industrial O&M robot with real orders

theme_map.theme: passive components and capacitor price rise
fresh_evidence: Nichicon announced broad aluminum capacitor price increases.
TrendForce said CSP self-developed ASIC could cause structural shortage of high-end special MLCC products in H2.
serenity_chokepoint_nodes: film/materials with actual scale, not tiny revenue share

theme_map.theme: oil, shipping, gold, and strategic resources
fresh_evidence: WTI crude rose about 4%; Brent touched 80 USD/bbl.
Gold and silver strengthened; global central-bank gold reserve demand remained in news.
Middle East/Hormuz-related headlines increased oil-shipping and energy-security sensitivity.
serenity_chokepoint_nodes: oil shipping capacity during geopolitical supply shock
tungsten/rare-metal resources with real reserves and pricing power

watchlist.name: 深南电路
watchlist.theme: AI data center PCB / high-speed interconnect
watchlist.chokepoint_node: high-end PCB capacity and AI server interconnect
watchlist.serenity_reason: The current AI infrastructure story points to physical interconnect and high-end PCB capacity, not only downstream AI applications. The stock was limit-up with 51.95bn yuan turnover, showing market confirmation on the same chokepoint.
required_follow_up: Verify current AI/server PCB order visibility and revenue share from latest reports.
Check whether next-day price has already overdrawn the catalyst.
risk_notes: High price and limit-up status may make execution difficult.
This is a research watch name, not an automatic buy.

watchlist.name: 生益科技
watchlist.chokepoint_node: high-end CCL and electronic material supply
watchlist.serenity_reason: If AI server PCB remains the market path, upstream CCL/material supply is a more Serenity-style bottleneck than broad PCB concept names. The stock had 212.44bn yuan turnover while closing only +0.42%, making it a capacity-core watch rather than a pure emotion chase.
required_follow_up: Verify high-end CCL order/revenue contribution and latest capacity utilization.
Compare with direct PCB leaders to judge whether funds choose upstream or downstream.
risk_notes: Large turnover with small gain can mean absorption or distribution; needs next-session confirmation.
Do not rank automatically above stronger market-confirmed names without price confirmation.

watchlist.name: 沪电股份
watchlist.chokepoint_node: high-speed PCB with current AI server demand
watchlist.serenity_reason: The market repeatedly confirmed high-speed PCB as a real physical bottleneck for AI data centers. The stock had 144.61bn yuan turnover and closed +4.20%, acting as a liquid capacity core.
required_follow_up: Verify whether current move is early continuation or late-stage consensus.
Check announcement/risk notices before using in trading skills.
risk_notes: Crowding risk is high after repeated PCB strength.
Needs pullback absorption or next-day continuation confirmation.

watchlist.name: 兆易创新
watchlist.serenity_reason: Memory and storage were supported by global headlines and local market action. The stock was the highest turnover name in the snapshot and closed limit-up, giving strong market confirmation.
required_follow_up: Confirm whether the move is earnings-cycle driven or emotion-driven memory beta.
Check valuation and whether a high open would consume the edge.
risk_notes: Already limit-up and extremely high turnover; next-day cash-out risk must be evaluated by trading skills.

Use sector confirmation from CPO/optical leaders before trading.

Needs market continuation rather than pure news mapping.

watchlist.serenity_reason: News flow mentioned the company has CW laser chip R&D capability and cooperation/layout in silicon photonics. Market turnover was 251.96bn yuan with +3.16%, showing strong liquidity.

Distinguish mature PCB business from future silicon photonics optionality.

Needs six-piece verification before hard ranking.

Check whether the move is already near short-term exhaustion.

watchlist.name: 光迅科技

watchlist.name: 昊华科技

Do not promote to rank 1-2 without company-level proof.

watchlist.name: 风华高科

rejected_or_downgraded_summary: Glass-substrate and electronic-cloth concept names need strict downgrade unless current orders/revenue are confirmed.
Several stocks issued clarification notices: no certification, no orders, business too small, or no direct product involvement.
High same-day strength is not enough to qualify as a Serenity bottleneck beneficiary.

usage_for_recommendation_skills.morning_stock_picker: Use this watchlist as hard-logic background. Re-rank only after same-day news increment and auction/opening confirmation.
usage_for_recommendation_skills.overnight_stock_picker: Use this watchlist to search for next-day discoverable hard-logic names, but require late-session acceptance and clean announcement risk.
usage_for_recommendation_skills.short_term_trend_trader: Use this watchlist to find 2-7 day trend candidates; hold only while both thesis and trend remain valid.
